templates.name: Consulting
templates.description: Manage clients, consultants, projects and billable time tracking, with a ready-made dashboard.
templates.screenshotCaption: The consulting dashboard — active clients and projects, billable amounts by project and consultant, and recent time entries.
features: Client and project management
Billable time tracking with a draft → submitted → approved workflow
Project teams with per-consultant rate levels
Ready-made dashboard: active projects, hours this week, pending approvals
Billing report and consultant CV reports

screenshots.caption: Project detail — client, status, dates, per-level rates, and rolled-up total hours and billable amount.
Every time entry in one place — filter by period, with hours and billable amounts totalled automatically.
Billing report — billable hours and revenue grouped by client, project, and consultant, with a grand total.
Consultant CV report — profile, rate level, education, and experience for each consultant.
Talk to your data — ask a question in plain English and get an instant table, with CSV and JSON export.

templates.author: snill

templates.name: Expense
templates.description: Employee expense tracking and approval, with AI receipt scanning, itemized line items and a ready-made dashboard.
templates.screenshotCaption: The expense dashboard — spend totals, approvals, expenses by status, and top categories.
features: Snap a photo of a receipt to auto-fill an expense item with AI
Employee expense submission with itemized line items
Receipt file attachments on every expense
Submitted → approved/rejected approval workflow
Ready-made dashboard: spend totals, pending approvals, and breakdowns

screenshots.caption: Snap a photo of a receipt on your phone and let the AI fill in the expense item details.
Every expense item in one list — categories, amounts, and attached receipts, totalled automatically.
Add an expense item, or hit “Scan / upload to fill” and let the AI read the receipt for you.
Talk to your data — ask for spend by category and get an instant breakdown, with PDF, CSV and JSON export.

templates.author: snill

templates.name: Contracts
templates.description: Track contracts, vendors and renewals with AI document scanning, notice-period alerts, a status workflow and a compliance dashboard.
templates.screenshotCaption: The contracts dashboard — annual obligations, active contracts, spend by category, and expiry alerts.
features: AI document scanning: drop a PDF or image to auto-fill contract terms
Contracts linked to vendors with a full event timeline
Renewal and notice-period alerts
Status workflow across contract stages
Compliance dashboard: expiring contracts and active vendors

screenshots.caption: Add a contract, or “Scan / upload to fill” to let the AI read the PDF and populate every field — vendor, dates, renewal terms, and financials.
Every contract in one view — vendor, status, value, notice period, and renewal type.
The contract record — full details and the draft → active → renewed → archived status workflow.
Talk to your data — ask for active contracts ranked by value and get an instant report.

templates.author: snill

templates.name: Incident Reporting
templates.description: Report incidents and deviations with AI photo scanning, severity triage, a review workflow, linked corrective actions and an HSE compliance dashboard.
templates.screenshotCaption: The HSE overview dashboard — open, critical and overdue incident counts, severity and category charts, and corrective-action tracking.
features: Snap a photo or upload a PDF and let AI fill in the incident report
Severity triage (low → critical) with color-coded badges and overdue row highlighting
Role-based review workflow: new → under review → in progress → resolved → closed
Corrective actions linked to each incident, with owners, due dates and due/overdue alerts
HSE compliance dashboard: open, critical and overdue incidents, charts and urgent items

screenshots.caption: The incidents register — color-coded severity and status badges, quick filters (Hide closed, Critical, Overdue) and search.
Incident detail — photo evidence, the new → under review → in progress → resolved → closed workflow, and the investigation and root-cause record.
Report an incident fast — drop a photo or PDF, or hit 'Scan / upload to fill' to let AI draft the report.
The AI reads the photo and auto-fills the report: title, category, severity, location and what happened — ready to review and save.

templates.author: snill
